title: Erl
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Erl.png]] |name=Erl |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Been nice knowing you, Erl."
"Likewise.|Erl and a crewmate before the counterattack on the Rebels|}} '''Erl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a member of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] crew commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Voss (Imperial officer)|Voss]]. Their ship was part of the [[secret armada]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]], tasked with transporting a mysterious creature known as the [[teezl]] to the Imperial [[Coruscant/Legends|capital]]. However, their ship was hit by an attack of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] piloting modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], and Voss immediately ordered Erl and his crewmates to return fire. Erl and one other member of the crew were skeptical of their chances of surviving the sneak attack. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 61}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy personnel of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
